summary: The stock has multiple bullish technical indicators, including positive momentum and a strong moving average setup, but recent 5-day return momentum is negative.
bullish_factors: Price is above the 20-day moving average.
The 20-day moving average is above the 50-day moving average.
The 12-day EMA is above the 26-day EMA, supporting positive momentum.
MACD is above its signal line, indicating positive momentum.
The stock has positive 20-day return momentum.
Recent trading volume is meaningfully above its 20-day average.
bearish_factors: The stock has negative 5-day return momentum.
